axis: bridge_health_parallel.sh HEXA_BIN container-context fix (closes bridge sweep)
trigger: ω-bridge-9 closure flagged tool/bridge_health_parallel.sh:41 as having the same single-line HEXA_BIN default needing the canonical container-context auto-detect

before.behavior: Inside Linux container (hexa-exec), the host wrapper $HOME/core/hexa-lang/hexa would attempt to exec the Mach-O hexa.real → 'Exec format error'. No container-context detection; explicit HEXA_BIN env override was the only escape hatch.

after.diff_summary: Replaced single-line default with canonical 18-line block mirroring tool/bridge_health.sh:36-53 verbatim. Adds _default_hexa_bin local, gated /.dockerenv + HEXA_IN_CONTAINER=1 + missing-host-wrapper detection that switches default to /usr/local/bin/hexa when an executable ELF dispatcher is present. Explicit HEXA_BIN env var still wins (precedence preserved). Comment header attributes the pattern to ω-bridge-8.

host.command: bash -n tool/bridge_health_parallel.sh && bash tool/bridge_health_parallel.sh --help | head -5; isolated source-block check resolved HEXA_BIN=/Users/ghost/core/hexa-lang/hexa

container.command: docker exec hexa-exec bash /Users/ghost/core/nexus/tool/bridge_health_parallel.sh --help; isolated source-block check inside container resolved HEXA_BIN=/usr/local/bin/hexa

remaining_at_risk_scripts.note: Uses different default ($HOME/Dev/hexa-lang/hexa) — legacy safe-mode wrapper, not part of bridge_health/atlas_dsl health-check family. Out of bridge-sweep scope.
Diagnostic script that explicitly probes for the host wrapper at $HOME/core/hexa-lang/hexa as part of its health check; container-context behaviour is not applicable (it is a host preflight tool).
String-matches '/hexa-lang/hexa ' in CMD for offload routing logic; no HEXA_BIN default-resolution pattern.
Wrapper dispatcher that picks among multiple candidate hexa binaries with its own resolution layer; has its own multi-candidate logic and is not in the bridge_health pattern family.
Remote-exec wrapper using $HOME/.hx/bin/hexa default for preflight; container-context not applicable (this is the dispatch layer, not a callee).
Local harness pointing HEXA_BIN_WRAP at sibling 'hexa' wrapper; not a bridge-health-style script.
